basics.name: M. Moein Shariatnia
basics.label: MD & ML Researcher
basics.summary: MD and ML researcher specialising in medical imaging, multimodal learning, LLMs, and generative AI. 350+ citations (h-index 6) and 4+ years of large-scale R&D, with collaborations at Google DeepMind, Mayo Clinic, Stanford, Harvard, and Hospital for Special Surgery. Published at ICML, ICLR, MICCAI workshops and leading medical journals. Co-secured >$70k in competitive grants.

work.name: AP Healthtect LLC
work.summary: Collaboration with Dr. Ayoosh Pareek's multidisciplinary team on AI for musculoskeletal imaging at Hospital for Special Surgery (HSS).
highlights: Started as sole ML developer; early results led to >$70k in competitive grants (AOSSM, ON Foundation, ISHA) and growth to a team of 3 engineers

Designed bone age prediction model from hand and knee X-rays (~3-month MAE, >20% over prior SOTA); built landmark detection pipeline with <1% keypoint error; model being integrated into clinical workflows
Co-leading self-supervised foundation model for MSK imaging and MRI-to-CT translation via diffusion models; collaborated on trustworthy AI for medicine with Harvard researchers (Dr. Rajpurkar)

work.name: Google DeepMind, Mayo Clinic, Stanford, RWTH Aachen
work.summary: Multiple research collaborations across top institutions.
highlights: DeepMind/UW: Large-scale distributed training (8x V100) on million-scale datasets; invented one-shot method with >10x compute savings. Papers at ICML 2022 and ICLR 2023
RWTH Aachen/Stanford: Developed TransDeepLab, Swin-Transformer medical image segmentation (~200 citations, MICCAI)

Mayo Clinic: Automated shoulder morphology measurement via keypoint detection (JSES 2022); lead developer of CONFLARE, conformal prediction for RAG (6k+ PyPI downloads); co-developed LatteReview multi-agent LLM framework

work.name: Rocket AB
work.summary: Built multimodal search pipeline for brand/logo conflict detection, Stockholm, Sweden.
highlights: Built multimodal search pipeline (CLIP embeddings + classical NLP) for brand/logo conflict detection across 500k+ trademarks in NoSQL database; FastAPI backend <150ms latency; Dockerized and deployed on Azure

work.name: Aris Co.
work.summary: Led development of face-health computer vision application, Tehran, Iran.
highlights: Led development of face-health CV application with personalised skincare recommendations; built end-to-end ML pipeline with 4 models (face detection, quality check, wrinkle/redness segmentation, skin classification) optimised for CPU inference; deployed via Django REST + Ray Serve (<20ms latency)

volunteer.summary: Peer review for top ML conferences and medical journals.
Workshop on 'An Introduction to Multi Agent AI Systems in Radiology'.

projects.name: Simple CLIP (PyTorch)

highlights: Cited in papers at top ML venues

projects.description: Conformal prediction framework for RAG with statistical coverage guarantees; benchmarked LLM+RAG for radiology QA.

projects.name: LatteReview
projects.description: Multi-agent LLM framework for automated systematic reviews, from screening to data extraction; async batch processing, Pydantic validation, multi-provider support.
